programmes.show_description: Richie Anderson is live from Salford with your Monday Motivation to kick start a brand new week, plus Secret Star and This Week in Songs.

programmes.show_description: Cerys invites stars of the West End musical Marie & Rosetta, Ntombizodwa Ndlovu and Beverley Knight, to perform live in the studio.

programmes.show_name: One Hit Wonders with OJ Borg
programmes.show_description: OJ is celebrating 41 years since The Dream Academy released Life In A Northern Town, and heading back to 1985 with Full Force, Sharpe & Numan and The Big Sound Authority.
